evidence: "I watched all of the Transformers movies and liked them all."
"I like it is just like the first one."
"It is a great no thought required show."
"I was not sure if I would like this show but after a few shows I started to really like it."
"I had trouble keeping interested in the movie. It was slow going and I have watched TV programs that were better."
"Workouts will are tough but boring. Had to keep motivated."
"I am happy with this movie. If you read the book it is a little disappointing because it is a little different than the book."
"The movie was good. There were some sad and happy parts throughout and overall a great movie."
"Just as good as the rest of the seasons. If you are a fan this season will not let you down."
"The routine is fun and not too hard to follow."
"I was not interested enough with it to try again. It was not overly fun."
"The movie was good. There were some sad and happy parts throughout and overall a great movie."
"I would recommend this to a friend."

summary: The user enjoys simple narratives and has a mixed preference for genres, particularly enjoying familiar franchises like Transformers. They appreciate emotional resonance in movies but have shown some dissatisfaction with pacing and quality in certain reviews.
